title: Random Item
body:
🎁 RandomItemPlugin

Give your Minecraft survival or minigame experience a twist! Every 30 seconds, all online players are automatically given a random item from the game. Whether it’s diamonds or dirt, expect the unexpected!


🔧 Features

⏱️ Gives a random item to every player every 30 seconds

✅ Compatible with Minecraft 1.21

🧪 Includes support for all vanilla items, including the newest from 1.21

📦 Simple and lightweight—great for party servers or challenge content



📜 Commands

/startgame – Starts the item-dropping event

/stopgame – Stops the event
